_comment: dependsOn: list story IDs this story requires. dependencyPolicy: 'skip' = skip if dep failed; 'block' = stop all.
description: Example PRD — replace with your feature description

userStories.title: Add a hello_world function to tools.py
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a hello_world() function in tools.py that returns a greeting string, so I can verify the ralph loop works end-to-end.

userStories.title: Add a farewell_world function that calls hello_world
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a farewell_world() function in tools.py that calls hello_world() and returns a farewell string, so I can verify story dependency works end-to-end.
